form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning by head Dundalk All Weather December 17 over 1408m defeating Apiary carrying 60.5kg at $4.50. On debut ninth of 14 at Leopardstown July 17 over 1307m, 6 len behind Fairy Oak carrying 58kg at $126. Well placed to pick up where he left off.

form.formComment: At the latest run 13th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, in the wet; 28 len behind Victory Tip carrying 55kg at $251. The race before that 8th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on February 27 over 2112m, 12 len behind Sutton Hoo with 57.5kg at $151. Will struggle again.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 8th of 14 at Cork on September 10 over 1207m, 7 len behind L L Koulsty carrying 57kg at $19. Sure to have taken a lot from that experience and is worth thought.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 16th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on a wet track; 30 len behind Victory Tip carrying 59.5kg at $29. Last start 7th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on March 20 over 1408m, 4.5 len behind Glitter And Glory carrying 61kg at $51. Rock hard fit now and is a big chance to win.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 40-day let-up. First-up after seven months 6th of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on February 27 over 1207m, 6 len behind Oxford Circus with 57.5kg at $4.30. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Cork on August 14 over 1408m, 12 len behind Precise carrying 58kg at $151. Look for a much better performance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 9th of 13 at Navan on March 30 over 2011m, in the wet; 13 len behind Servare carrying 56kg at $13.
